title: aristida pallens var. murina
intro: Aristida pallens var. murina, also known as the Needle Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Aristida pallens var. murina include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating skin infections and wounds. The plant is often prepared in the form of tea or infusions, and it can also be used to make essential oils and extracts for topical application and internal use.
